n: Book 2, Chapter 12: A Dead Man's Challenge

steps.t: Emelin haunts the area called Ost Haer. Aric spoke of a shade called Emelin. If you can prove your worth to the shade, he might give you the informati…
Emelin haunts the area called Ost Haer. Emelin has tasked you with defeating the apparitions of his dead warriors. Succeed, and he will help you. Fail…
